tests.test_name: Selenium - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a single Selenium test receives valid, complete documentation with at least one named test in the output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a single Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
At least one test entry is present in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Selenium - PO - Parameterized expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a Product Owner uploading a data-driven Selenium test sees each data row expanded into its own separate test entry in the output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a data-driven Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
Each data row in the parameterized test is expanded into its own test entry, resulting in multiple tests

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Selenium - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a single Selenium test receives documentation that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a single Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
At least one test entry is present in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each documented test is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty array test_coverage_matrix
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry for the test

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a data-driven Selenium test sees all data rows collapsed into a single test entry with a coverage matrix row for each example.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a data-driven Selenium test file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded output are fully populated with no placeholders or missing data
All data rows are collapsed into a single test entry rather than expanded

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The collapsed test entry is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row from the parameterized test is represented as a separate row in the coverage matrix

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for generic
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected structure for generic test types
